title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FabHotels - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FabHotels - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
FabHotels invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FabHotels:
FabHotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabHotels!
